title: boechera rollinsiorum
intro: Boechera rollinsiorum, also known as Rollins' rockcress, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant native to the United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Boechera rollinsiorum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
